Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
P. Christian Scheley, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Elaine Marie Macneilly

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. 2) defendant's motion to compel responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents is Granted.
No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $195 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf To Testify At Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
P. Christian Scheley, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Elaine Marie Macneilly

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. 3) defendant's motion to compel attendance at deposition is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant to schedule the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $195 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
